svg.title: The three pillars of the Harare City Council AI Platform
svg.desc: Three equal pillars: Citizen AI Assistant, Workflow and Reporting Engine, and Governance Dashboard, each with their key capabilities listed.
svg.text: Modular municipal AI platform — each pillar independently scalable and replaceable

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Citizen AI Assistant pillar')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Workflow and Reporting Engine pillar')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Governance Dashboard pillar')

svg.text: Click any pillar to explore it further
